newsletter.title: Weekly notes, not noise
newsletter.description: I am moving the best ideas from this site into a future Substack. The public subscribe link is not live yet, so the cleanest way to join early is to send a quick note and I will keep you posted.
newsletter.statsNote: These counters are saved on this browser for now. They are a lightweight Phase 11 bridge until analytics-backed community numbers go live.

discussion.title: Continue the conversation
discussion.description: I am keeping comments intentionally lightweight for now. If a post sparks a disagreement, question, or extension, send me a note and I will actually read it.

quotes.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: Knowing others is intelligence; knowing yourself is true wisdom.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: To improve is to change; to be perfect is to change often.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Do not pray for an easy life, pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: When there is no enemy within, the enemies outside cannot hurt you.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Will Durant

quotes.text: The quieter you become, the more you are able to hear.
quotes.author: Rumi
